allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\MyPortfolio" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not \(Test-Path "d:\\MyPortfolio"\)\) { Write-Host "Directory does not exist" } else { Write-Host "Directory exists" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node", "npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, Name, CPU, @{N="RunTime";E={\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
